title: PDF file attachment won't open in Acrobat, but will open in "Preview in Thurderbird" or if saved to disk
creator: nsolot
content:
PDF file attachments were working fine and now they don't.

I get no error message, but nothing happens when it's set to open in Acrobat. I can view the file in "Preview in Thunderbird" and the file isn't corrupted as I can save to disk and then open in Acrobat.

I tried restarting TB in troubleshoot mode with add-ons disabled, but that did not solve.

Thanks for help!

title: Sent mail is not actually sent...   no errors, not in sent folder, but appears in mail search.
creator: viper9087
content:
Hello, For the past month unknown to me, all mail that I have sent or replied to has not reached it's destination and I cannot figure it out.

Using Thunderbird desktop, (up to date). Any mail I send appears to send, (status shows sending, loading bar, sent, saved to sent folder) but the mail is not actually sent, doesn't appear in the web mail history, doesn't appear in thunderbird as a draft, sent, or anything... BUT if i search for the mail, I get a search result of the mail showing a sent date, but i cannot actually locate the mail in any folder, and i do not know how to view the message properties to see where it is saved to.

I have triple checked the server settings, I can read, get new mail, and see sent mail sent from the web, but nothing about mail sent via thunderbird. I have deleted and re entered the server settings, I have cleared thunderbird cache, repaired the folder, tried troubleshooting mode, and just can't find any errors or anything signaling a problem.

Mail server is a web domain. No issues using roundcube.
metadata: ;useragent:Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:148.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/148.0;tb_version:149;os:Windows 10
